name: radia-mcp
summary: MCP servers for the Radia CAE ecosystem. 0.33.4 (2026-04-26): Kelvin knowledge maturity pass -- radia_ngsolve.kelvin (why 1/8 sphere benchmark is BVP-invalid, rho_min sweep diagnostic, -specialcf.normal sign), cubit kelvin_reduction_traps (subtract-keep no-op in 2025.3, octant anchor determinism), electromagnet symmetry_reductions (sphere vs C-yoke 1/8 path + ELF CEFC 2020 BC). 0.33.0: Finish monorepo consolidation.
